name: Google AI Studio
notes: Up to 2M context; free tier on Flash variants

name: Alibaba DashScope
notes: Alibaba Cloud Model Studio; Qwen family

name: Upstage
notes: Korean AI lab; strong document AI

name: HuggingFace Inference
notes: Huge model catalog; free tier available

name: Glhf.chat
notes: vLLM-backed; run any HF model with hf: prefix

name: Cloudflare Workers AI
notes: Edge inference; neuron-second billing; needs account ID

name: Modal
notes: Serverless GPU; deploy your own models

name: Relace
notes: Coding APIs; zero data retention default

name: Cloudflare AI Gateway
notes: Edge caching; sits in front of APIs

name: NLP Cloud
notes: NER, summarization, chat; custom API format

name: Puter.js
notes: No API key needed; web/Node.js SDK

name: 302.AI
notes: OpenCode-supported; unified OpenAI-compatible gateway for 100+ models

name: Atomic Chat
notes: OpenCode-supported; desktop app with local OpenAI-compatible server

name: Azure Cognitive Services
notes: OpenCode-supported; separate from Azure OpenAI; set AZURE_COGNITIVE_SERVICES_RESOURCE_NAME

name: Cortecs
notes: OpenCode-supported; EU GDPR-compliant LLM router with speed/cost/balanced routing

name: FrogBot
notes: OpenCode-supported; unified AI subscription for chat, embeddings, audio, and images

name: GitLab Duo
notes: OpenCode-supported; OAuth or PAT; Premium/Ultimate; set GITLAB_INSTANCE_URL for self-hosted

name: GitHub Copilot
notes: OpenCode-supported; OAuth via /connect; separate from GitHub Models marketplace API

name: Ollama Cloud
notes: OpenCode-supported; remote Ollama host; pull cloud models locally first

name: OpenCode Zen
notes: OpenCode-curated models verified for coding agents; use opencode/<model-id> prefix

name: OpenCode Go
notes: OpenCode-supported; low-cost subscription for open coding models; use opencode-go/<model-id>

name: LLM Gateway
notes: OpenCode-supported; unified API with provider/model routing

name: SAP AI Core
notes: OpenCode-supported; 40+ models via BTP; service key JSON auth

name: STACKIT AI Model Serving
notes: OpenCode-supported; EU sovereign hosting for Llama, Mistral, Qwen

name: Snowflake Cortex
notes: OpenCode-supported; OAuth or PAT; Claude/OpenAI families with tool calling

name: Sakana AI (Fugu)
notes: Trained multi-agent orchestrator; routes to frontier LLM pool via single OpenAI-compatible API

name: Prism API
notes: Independent OpenAI-compatible gateway for overseas developers; low-cost GPT-5.5 access and crypto-friendly recharge/voucher options
